modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: OneDrive shows red X, documents may not be syncing.

full_description_text: User notices a red X on OneDrive. Files appear disconnected when accessed from the computer. Concern about document syncing status. Unclear if this is a temporary issue or something more serious.
short_description: OneDrive shows red X, documents may not be syncing.
description: User notices a red X on OneDrive. Files appear disconnected when accessed from the computer. Concern about document syncing status. Unclear if this is a temporary issue or something more serious.
